jeorg-camel-app-atm/pom.xml.general_idea: Explicitly declare the maven-war-plugin to ensure WAR packaging works correctly with newer Maven versions.
Integrate JaCoCo for code coverage measurement and reporting.
Integrate Coveralls plugin to upload coverage reports to the Coveralls service.
Add JAXB API dependency required by the Coveralls plugin due to its removal from the JDK in Java 11+.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version from 11 to 17 to align with the migration goal.
Upgrade Apache Camel core version to 2.24.0 to support newer features and fixes.
Upgrade Lombok version to 1.18.22 for compatibility and new features.
Add UTF-8 encoding properties for source and reporting to ensure consistent character handling.
Add JaCoCo Maven plugin to enable code coverage analysis.
Add Coveralls Maven plugin to upload coverage reports to Coveralls.
Add JAXB API dependency required by the Coveralls plugin in Java 11+ environments where JAXB is no longer bundled.

README.md.general_idea: Updated the main project title in the README to reflect the new repository name.
Added badges for CircleCI, AppVeyor, and GitHub Actions to display build status.
Added badges for Codacy, Codebeat, BetterCodeHub, and Snyk to display code quality and security status.
Added badges for Codacy Coverage, Coveralls, and Codecov to display test coverage metrics.
Added Twitter share button and generic GitHub info badges.
Added badges showing language count, top language, and code size.
